chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Constitution Petition No. D – 4819 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) Priority. 1. For hearing of CMA No.20108/2025. 2. For hearing of main case. 14.10.2025 Mr. Umer Ilyas Khan, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Faheem Ali Memon, Advocate for Respondents 2 & 3. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, DAG. ********** Learned counsel for the Petitioner files a statement to enclose stay order passed by the Appellate Tribunal Inland Revenue of Pakistan Karachi on the Petitioner’s appeal thereby staying recovery on the basis of the impugned notice. Since the matter is now seized by the Appellate Tribunal hence purpose of filing this petition has been served. The petition along with listed application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE NADEEM QURESHI PA
